body:
## Dealix Research & Targeting OS

A repeatable, **governed** daily loop that turns seeds + allowlisted research into a scored, evidence-backed **target pool** — not an outbound blaster. **Quality over volume. No external send without founder approval.**

> The "400" is a research/analysis pool, **not** 400 messages.

### What it does
1. Collect (seeds ± allowlisted discovery) → 2. Normalize (AR/EN names + domains) → 3. De-dupe (domain, then name; merge evidence) → 4. Attach evidence → 5. Score (100-pt model) → 6. Infer weakness → Dealix OS → 7. Recommend offer rung → 8. Emit raw pool / shortlist → 9. Build **review-only** drafts.

### Scoring (100 pts)
ICP Fit 35 · Pain Signal 25 · Intent/Timing 20 · Access 10 · Evidence Confidence 10 · Risk Penalty −20 → grades A+/A/B/C/D.

**Golden rule (enforced):** never target without **2 pain evidences OR a warm path** — otherwise the grade is capped at **B** and routed to a free Diagnostic.

### Weakness → Dealix OS
Proof weakness→Proof OS · Follow-up leakage→Revenue OS · Delivery visibility→Delivery OS · Support recurrence→Support OS · Executive decision fog→Command OS · Data fragmentation→Data OS.

### Governance / non-negotiables
- Reuses the canonical doctrine guard `safe_send_gateway` + `governance_os.claim_safety`.
- Allowed sources pinned in `data/targeting/source_allowlist.json`; **blocked sources hard-rejected and logged**.
- No scraping behind login · no robots.txt/CAPTCHA bypass · no LinkedIn automation · no cold/bulk WhatsApp · no mass email · **no auto-send** · no claim without evidence.

### Files
| Path | Purpose |
| --- | --- |
| `scripts/research_targeting_os.py` | The engine (dependency-light, importable, CLI). |
| `data/targeting/{company_seed_template.csv,queries.txt,source_allowlist.json}` | Inputs. |
| `docs/go-to-market/RESEARCH_TARGETING_OS.md` | System spec (AR+EN). |
| `docs/go-to-market/DAILY_400_TARGETING_PLAYBOOK.md` | Daily ritual (AR+EN). |
| `docs/governance/PROSPECT_RESEARCH_COMPLIANCE_POLICY.md` | Binding policy (AR+EN). |
| `.github/workflows/daily-targeting-os.yml` | 08:00 Riyadh; artifacts only; never sends. |
| `tests/test_research_targeting_os.py` | 23 tests. |

### Outputs (`data/targeting/out/`, gitignored)
`ranked_targets.csv` · `ranked_targets.jsonl` · `daily_targeting_brief.md` · `drafts_for_review.md` · `weakness_map.md`

### Run
```bash
python scripts/research_targeting_os.py \
  --seed data/targeting/company_seed_template.csv \
  --out data/targeting/out --top 50
```
Optional allowlisted discovery via `GOOGLE_SEARCH_API_KEY` + `GOOGLE_SEARCH_CX` (graceful seed-only fallback when keys absent — reads public result metadata only, no scraping).

### Tests
`tests/test_research_targeting_os.py` — **23 passed, 1 skipped** (the skip runs from repo root). `tests/test_doctrine_guardrails.py` still passes. ruff + black (py311) clean on the new files.

> Discovery provider can be swapped (Vertex AI Search / SerpAPI / Tavily / Brave) without changing the engine or the policy.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01EMmqgsT4T39K1GqAB6uH3e

---
_Generated by [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code/session_01EMmqgsT4T39K1GqAB6uH3e)_

commits.messageBody:
Adds a repeatable daily research/targeting engine that turns seeds plus
allowlisted discovery into a scored, evidence-backed target pool — not an
outbound blaster. Quality over volume; no external send without founder
approval.

- scripts/research_targeting_os.py: normalize/dedupe, 100-pt firmographic
  score, weakness->Dealix-OS mapping, offer ladder, golden-rule grade cap,
  optional Google Programmable Search discovery (graceful seed-only fallback),
  and five review-only outputs (ranked CSV/JSONL, brief, drafts, weakness map).
- Reuses safe_send_gateway doctrine guard + governance_os claim-safety; blocked
  sources are hard-rejected and logged.
- data/targeting/: seed template, queries, source allowlist.
- docs: RESEARCH_TARGETING_OS, DAILY_400_TARGETING_PLAYBOOK (go-to-market),
  PROSPECT_RESEARCH_COMPLIANCE_POLICY (governance).
- .github/workflows/daily-targeting-os.yml: 08:00 Riyadh, artifacts only, never sends.
- tests/test_research_targeting_os.py: 23 tests (normalize, dedupe, scoring,
  golden rule, weakness/offer, source policy, drafts, end-to-end).

https://claude.ai/code/session_01EMmqgsT4T39K1GqAB6uH3e
commits.messageHeadline: Add Dealix Research & Targeting OS (daily governed targeting loop)

commits.messageBody:
- scripts/research_targeting_os.py: remove unused
  doctrine_violations_for_revenue_intelligence import + fallback (only
  enforce_doctrine_non_negotiables is used).
- tests/test_research_targeting_os.py: assert exact list membership on
  split evidence_urls instead of substring-in-URL (CodeQL py/incomplete-url-
  substring-sanitization).

https://claude.ai/code/session_01EMmqgsT4T39K1GqAB6uH3e
commits.messageHeadline: Address CodeQL: drop unused import, exact URL list membership in test

commits.messageBody:
aquasecurity/trivy-action@0.24.0 no longer resolves (old non-v tags were
removed upstream); the filesystem scan failed on every PR. Pin to the
current v-prefixed release tag v0.36.0 so the scan runs again.
commits.messageHeadline: ci: fix unresolvable Trivy action pin in repository hardening

commits.messageBody:
…alert

The split-then-membership form still tripped CodeQL's incomplete-url-
substring-sanitization heuristic (URL literal as left operand of `in`).
Compare the full evidence set by equality instead.
commits.messageHeadline: test: compare evidence set by equality to clear CodeQL URL-substring …

commits.messageBody:
The Trivy action-pin fix is out of scope for the Targeting OS feature: once
the action resolves, the scan surfaces pre-existing repo-wide findings
(Next.js dependency CVEs in apps/web + frontend lockfiles, plus false-positive
secret matches in existing verify scripts). Restore the workflow to the main
baseline so this PR stays scoped; the pin + CVEs are tracked separately.
commits.messageHeadline: Revert Trivy pin change from this PR (keep feature scope)

title: Add Dealix Research & Targeting OS (daily governed targeting loop)
